current_claim: Externally reviewable high-assurance research artifact with active external evidence intake.
score_rule: Roadmap documentation creates obligations, not score credit. Credit requires evidence-derived closure.

clean_external_validation_contingency.scope: defined evidence rubric and validated audit scope only
clean_external_validation_contingency.non_claim: not perfection, invulnerability, government approval, production authority, or validity outside tested scope
